entry.title: Customer credit control issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We are on S4HANA, We have an issue with customer credit control since last SPS update.

Control and blocking is not done when creating new sales order for customer who credit exposure is not yet exceeding credit limit (case1)
but if customer credit exposure already exceed credit limit, all new sales orders will be blocked correctly (case2)

It seems that during creation of sales order the credit check done without consider the new credit Exposure of customer, including the amount of sales order created.

We have the same problem for a second company on the same system who have control when creating deliveries.

Could you please give us some analysis to identify the origin of the problem.

Thanks.

entry.title: API Testing in SAP Build Actions Dropping Part of Request
entry.content:
Hi Builders,

I'm testing the SAP Ariba API "Create Procurement Workspace" in the Actions tab of the SAP Build platform before deploying it in a Build Process Automation flow. I've noticed that when I try to provide a value for the "FieldValueMap" field, this value is dropped from the API response body and is not in the Procurement Workspace that is created.  I have tested this request on the API development platform Bruno and it successfully picked up the value provided in this field which makes me think it's more of an Actions issue than an API request issue.  Any help as to what may be happening would be much appreciated!  Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Configuring SAP Cloud ALM for Integration Suite
entry.content: Sorry, but system Says: "The endpoint creation is not required for the SAP Integration Suite, as none of the Cloud ALM use cases requires an endpoint."

entry.title: Professional Service for billing the product P003 is not allocated for usage based billing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Professional Services community,
APP:  Plan Customer Projects

I choose with the above APP and project to customer the work package = Service based (unit) and the Service unit = product / Activty type = U001. The related sales price for product U001 (PCP0 - Project WBS) = 1,15 € / per unit (in total 10.000 unit for the 6 months contract period). After project stage release and on the billing tab I used the contract type = usage based and after enter the system automated allocate the product = P002 instead of P003. 

Furthermore I can't create the monthly billing with the monthly unit = 500 and sales unit price = 1,15 € for the amount to be billed = 575 € (revenue).

I hope you could support me in this regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Two processing rules would match a bank statement ite...
entry.content: Hi, I have noticed that after last update to 2408.x, there is always an error/info message saying that you can use rule only when there are no more effective ones. So I made all the rules for one rule to one case occasion only. It costs extra time, but it is working.

entry.title: How do I created a deep entity in an MDK app
entry.content:
Hi experts, I have a new requirement for a deep insert. I don't quite understand how to do this in mdk.

I need to create a PM order and operation (Offline). If anyone can help, it would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: PDF Attachment in VA01
entry.content:
I was facing the same issue. I could resolve it by maintaining below parameter in user profile. 

SD_GOS_ATTACHMENTS = X

Please refer SAP Note 1466810 - Object services missing in SD Sales transactions - SAP for Me for more details.

entry.title: Re: Custom mandatory comment in Compensation Form
entry.content:
Hi @MDI8 

forced comments are only available through standard recommendation columns at this time so the exact requirement you are describing cannot be met.

You could however look at building a Hard stop using custom validations to prevent a Save (but it wouldn't come with comments). example here.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: reuse HU in SHPCON (WHSCON) IDoc
entry.content:
In the standard, the system checks the uniqueness flag set in customizing with function module HU_TVSHP_SELECT.

The enhancement you need to implement aim to temporary consider that variable ef_exidv_unique = 0 (uniqueness flag deactivated) to avoid the triggering of the standard error message.

To avoid side effect of the complete Uniqueness deactivation, this deactivation is required only when it is really required :
- when GI is posted against a SHPCON IDoc
- or in case of a manual VL09 cancellation flow of a delivery which was previously sent to an external system because other wise you will have an inconsistency

For the first case :

In our solution SHPCON IDoc are processed with a specific function module ZFM_IDOC_INPUT_DELVRY.

If this function module is triggered, we save in the memory buffer a boolean value = True. We call this value in the enhancement of function module HU_TVSHP_SELECT to proceed, if it is equal to TRUE, with the deactivation of HU uniqueness flag.

For the second case:

The goods issue cancellation flows in SAP uses the standard function group SAPLV51W. Include LV51WFHU contains the functions which are used to cancel goods issue on handling units. At this point, we’re able to retrieve the outbound delivery number which is not directly available in function module HU_TVSHP_SELECT
In the standard, the system checks the uniqueness flag set in customizing with function module HU_TVSHP_SELECT.

In your enhancement :
- you need to check if the transaction used is VL09 (sy-tcode = ‘VL09’) 
- you also need to check if an output has already been sent to an external system: use the delivery number to look up for an entry in table NAST (log table for output) with partner type = LS. If there is at least an entry, you can save the delivery number in the memory buffer and proceed with the enhancement.

entry.title: Re: Leverage the SAP Analytics Cloud Data Export Service to extract your planning data to SAP HANA,
entry.content:
Moin Max,

thanks for your helpfull blog: Please allow me one question, can you tell us, if this is your recommended and strategic future plan using SAP SDI for (full data) SAC Writeback connections?

If you have some time, this is a closer view to our background:

Right now, we (BWonHANA 7.5; BPC 10.1 Standard; SAC Reporting; and upcoming in 01.2025 SAC Planning) are not using SAP SDI. For externel SAP BW APIs with SaaS-Origin we are using SAP BTP IS. For internal origin we are fine using also SAP SDA Connections.

Using SDI for only getting Master Data (in the end also via ODATA) in a low range is a another investment to do, beside the huge BTP invest. As you know, we have to setup Servers, pay for Linux licences and security talkings, because it is a new way in from outside to our OnPremise platform – next to the prefered BTP IS solutions. With SDI/DP-Agent this would be the third technical solution beside BTP (Non SAP SaaS) and CLC-Connections (SAC Live, SAC ODATA Legacy).

We found nothing in this direction on your roadmaps, either how it will works with the upoming „seamless planning“. We are interested in using SAP Datasphere with SAC Plannning in future planning scenarios. And also here we are questioing ourself, is SDI  the right way to go with?

I know, it's a tough question, but maybe you have some insights from the SAP laboratory. Can you confirm, that SAP BTP is not your supported option to consume an ODATA-Connection from SAC Planning and SDI is the solution for all your future planning sceanrios in BW/4 and Datasphere?

Thanks in advance for your help.

Best Regards from Hamburg,

Torsten

entry.title: Visibility of custom fields for end users
entry.content:
Hi Veryone,

 

There is a way to make custom fields of the item entity visible for the end users?

 

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Visibility of all the status of the approvals?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As a learning administrator in the user file in the approval tab I can see all the approvals with all statutes (denied, approved, cancelled...).

It seems that for the end user, he can only see the pending approvals.

There is a way for the end user to see all the statutes as well (denied, approved, cancelled...)?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Shared row axis in two tables in SAP Analytics Cloud...
entry.content: Thank you William!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Writing formatted text to a file.
entry.content:
I'm investigation ways of presenting formatted information from the results of say an LLM call.

I've looked into the Word SDK and this has an Insert text (Word) action. However, this has a single input of text which won't show for example html formatting in the word document.

The best we can do is open a pre-existing word document as a 'tempate' which has a formatted header, we set our output string to the body of the document which will have a format of whatever is specified in the template doc (Heading 3 in this case).

This is OK, but  it would be much better if we had a mechanism for passing in formatted text. That way we could have a document with headings in bold, different colours, and whatever styling we choose, making for a more professional-looking report. At the moment we can have line breaks and that's about it.

 

Are there any alternative to the Word SDK? I've also looked into the Microsoft office 365 Cloud SDK which handles SharePoint files but a) that doesn't seem to have a write formatted text action either and b) we are awaiting Azure access to get this setup.

entry.title: Re: Third-party process overview
entry.content:
I have a scenario where same vendor-material combination is used for direct procurement (shipping to our warehouse) and also for 3rd party (shipping directly to customer). We maintain PIR where the confirmation control is set to "004". This works for direct procurement as we post goods receipt against inbound delivery document. However, in 3rd party PO (different doc. type) also the confirmation control is defaulting to "004" and user has to manually remove it from the PO to post goods receipt directly against the PO. 

Is there a way to stop the confirmation control from defaulting in 3rd party PO? 

Any insights will be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @DobrovolskayaTanya 

the service destination can be created with the following command:
cf create-service destination lite python_dest_service

 

During a recent deployment I also had the issue with "datasphere not found". The issue was that the CLI command was not found or the path not set correctly. For a quick fix I added in the execution of the CLI commands the following path:

Hope this helps!

Regards

Christian

How we can add missing standard field in a FIORI app, which is part of the object (e.g. maintenance order) but not of the data source structure of the FIORI app?

Is there any clean core option available to add missing standard field in the FIORI app?

entry.title: SAP Personas , script OnEnter with unwanted "enter" function - HUPAST
entry.content:
Hello,

I've created a flavor on HUPAST where my user can scan the EAN number of a product instead of the product.

I've made the script to filled automatically the material and quantity, and the script should stop here.

When I execute the script manually, it works fine and stop on the quantity field.

When I put the script on the OnEnter event, the script runs and pack automatically the quantity without stopping.

I debug it and cannot figure out why it doesn't stop.

I'm on personas SP18 / ECC6 EHP7.

Thanks and best regards,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Re: Defaulting to the legacy home page - H2 2024 (New Lea...
entry.content: @PL1: In 2H 2024 SAP removes the switch to activate/deactivate the ILX. It will be active from then on.

entry.title: SAP internship in cybersecurity
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am looking for a long-term internship for the second year of my master's program in Cybersecurity, which will be next year. If you have any information about long-term internship opportunities in SAP for cybersecurity students or anything you can help me with, please do not hesitate to reply.

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Management Class 7 support
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have recently become an active member on this community forum as I am exploring more about the New S/4HANA Product Compliance solution's capability and assess its suitability for my customer. As part of the overall project, we will be implementing S/4HANA 2023 - this is non-negotiable.

I am seeking advice in terms of the Dangerous Goods Management solution and its support for Class 7. I have (very recently) managed to set up the solution on our demo system and have a very good idea of how this process works on a generic level. Steps I performed as follows: 

  1. (pre requisite) - activate relevant dangerous goods compliance requirements, e.g. IATA, IMDG, ADR, and assign to a compliance purpose
  2. material master records (that represent the unpackaged and packaged product) set to compliance relevant. These are called product master in S/4HANA Fiori
  3. create product compliance view for unpackaged product - assign the material master records to the view. Maintain relevant compliance data in the view
  4. assign compliance purposes from step 0 to the compliance view
  5. classify unpackaged product - assign relevant UN number per regulation. This determines the relevant descriptions
  6. classify packaged product - assign relevant UN number per regulation, Determine enclosure variants and packaging. assess transport permissibility

I now have some questions 🙂

As mentioned before, we are specifically interested in classifying products under Class 7 regulations (such as UN 2977 and UN 2978).

  1. The customer completes their classification of items on a batch-by-batch basis e.g. at delivery rather than at master data level. If that "packaged product" contains less quantity of the unpackaged material, then it may be classified under a different number. Further, it may have different enclosures depending on what unpackaged material is inside the packaged product. Finally, the dangerous goods note will have to have varied data on it depending on the material and qty in the packaged product. What would be the correct way of managing this? 
  2. Following from point 1, the quantity of unpackaged material and the weight of the overall packaged product must be declared, which would only be made available at transactions such as delivery (e.g. handling unit). Further, other class 7 relevant information such as the transport index, activity and critical safety index is not available in the dangerous goods classification app, and logically can only be entered at point of delivery anyway. Entering these details would then determine further labelling such as Radioactive Category I, Category II White/Yellow etc. which can’t really be determined at the master data level, such as the product compliance view. I have noticed the transport index (T.I.), packaging instruction, critical safety index (C.S.I), and radioactive category I/II/III labels calculated from the T.I. are available in the Handling Unit screen in the VL03N transaction. Can these be incorporated in the standard solution, and if so, how?
  3. It is unclear to me if this solution in S/4HANA 2023 actually generates a dangerous goods note as standard or not. The roadmap I reviewed suggests to me that the generation of dangerous goods notes is unavailable. Please confirm if my assumption is correct. If so, this would mean that we will require an enhancement to print a customised form.
  4. Can the same material representing a packaged product be assigned to multiple different materials representing unpackaged products? We have a scenario where a parent material representing a container will have different child materials that represent different compositions and concentrations. 

Any information with support for Class 7 and ability to classify at batch/serialised level will be fantastic.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Defaulting to the legacy home page - H2 2024 (New Lea...
entry.content: @PL1: In 2H 2024 SAP removes the switch to activate/deactivate the ILX. It will be active from then on. Only the second switch (New Learning Experience switch default setting) remains. But this one only determines which homepage version the user will see when he enters the LMS. Is is not possible to remove the toggle for him, so that he cannot switch to ILX. But that is exactly what we need because the ILX still has missing important functions and UX bugs!

entry.title: Re: the exchange rate is showing wrong at the Header leve...
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

My client has many users who have no knowledge about exchange rates. Is it possible to input automatically?

entry.title: The future of process mining is knocking: Join the AI-assisted process analyzer beta program
entry.content:
On November 6th we’ve announced the release of the SAP Signavio, AI-assisted process analyzer, text to insights capability. Previously available for testing to select few customers, this capability is now accessible to all SAP Signavio Process Intelligence customers via an open beta program.

This blog delivers essential information on this new AI capability and how you can be among the first to experience its features by joining our dedicated beta program.

AI-assisted process analyzer, text to insights – what is it

Process mining is vital for any organization but is often regarded as a field reserved to experts who are familiar with data analysis and complex query language. This new AI capability changes that perspective. It is designed to democratize process mining, making it accessible to a broader range of stakeholders. Regardless of their technical expertise, a wider range of users, including business users, can use natural language to obtain deep and immediate insights that inform strategic and business decisions.

Check out this short interactive demo that gives a sneak peek into the capability.  

About the beta program 

This open beta program provides you with early access to the process analyzer capability enabling you to test its features and experience how these support your business requirements.​ 

Why participating 

By joining our beta program, you will have the opportunity to:   

  • Access Early Innovation: Gain early access to our new AI-assisted process analyzer and test this capability with your own processes, data, and landscape before its official release.  
  • Shape the Future: Provide valuable feedback on features, usability, and quality, helping us refine and perfect this innovative capability.   
  • Stay Ahead: Obtain early access to additional process analyzer features scheduled for release in early 2025.    

Participation requirements: The beta program is free of charge and open to all SAP Signavio Process Intelligence customers with an active license.  

Timelines: Registration period has started on November 6th and ends on May 31st, 2025. The program duration is minimum 180 days from signing the TEA (Test and Evaluation Agreement), on a first-come, first-served basis.  

Seats are limited, so act fast! Contact your customer success partner or account manager to apply or write me directly here.

Don't miss this chance to be part of SAP Signavio's latest AI innovation. Join us in shaping the future of process intelligence!  

For more information about our process AI capabilities, visit this page.

entry.title: How the proposed PIR is calculated in Maintain PIR
entry.content: How this proposed PIR is calculated

entry.title: python script that uses oauth2.0 with 'api access' without manuel login to fetch data via odata?
entry.content:
Python script to get Datasphere data via odata api:

I have seen some guides to create oauth2.0 client and make rest calls to datasphere odata apis via Postman. However, that  oauth2.0 client uses the 'interactive' purpose option with a callback uri. That means i have to manually login on browser or open the link to get the first token and then continue querying via the odata api. This method works fine, however, it cannot be used for production script that pulls data from a Datasphere view every day.

For this reason, I tried with a oauthclient2.0 with 'api access' purpose and 'client_credentials'  as authorization, in order to avoid manual login. With the client_id and secret, i am able to call the token_url and receive a token. However, when i use this token to query any view or table in datasphere, it returns the login page html elements as text in the response.  
So my question is it possible to somehow avoid manual login and run a python script locally or in Azure cloud Function to get data from Datasphere via odata apis. 

@Asim_Munshi @gustavokath

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: Is there any ETA on the Phase II Release yet!

entry.title: Re: Custom mandatory comment in Compensation Form
entry.content: To add on to Xavier's solution above - the only way you could allow for comments would be for them to be from a list and not be free text. That way you could perform logic on your default value such as "None Selected" or "Not Applicable" or whatever you choose as a default. The only way to accomplish it would be by combining the hard stop with an enumerated list where the values are predictable and issue an error if a comment is not selected.

entry.title: best way to reach out to Moderators?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I had lost access to my old account, got comment from a moderator to send an email to Community@sap.com. I am sending emails for last few days, but got no acknowledgment. Is there any better way to reach out to the team, than sending email to the above address? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to restrict a measure in SAC Story tab...
entry.content:
@Sunandha 

Assuming when you say restrict you mean prevent access to those measures. In SAC you cannot define security on measures, its only on dimensions. So I do not think there is a way where you can restrict access to some measures.

Workaround:

If there are selected table and charts , you can always have 2 versions ( one with less measures)  of them overlapping each other and then may be hide the one based on user accessing it. You will need to do some scripting.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @richaknotts79,

The value of constant 401HC is set as $10,000, as per https://www.irs.gov/newsroom/401k-limit-increases-to-23500-for-2025-ira-limit-remains-7000
Also, note 3470796 (BEN: SECURE 2.0 Act - Section 109) says: "This parameter holds the increased amount ($10,000 in 2025). The amount set is used as the catch-up limit if it is greater than 50% more than the regular catch-up limit ($7,500 in 2024)."

Best,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @cchennault,

The ETA for the Phase II note is around Thanksgiving.

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Getting started - Send Events from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Event Mesh on Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Two years ago we had worked closely with SAP to work on an SAP Event Mesh and Azure Event Grid integration, SAP Event Mesh: Event Connector to Microsoft Azure... - SAP Community 

At that time I had worked quite a bit with SAP Event Mesh and how to send events from your SAP system to SAP BTP. Recently I wanted to do it again, and it was hard to find a real end-to-end documentation. 

After struggling a little with the exact configuration, I finally got it working and thought to share my findings. If you know what to do, it is actually really simple!

I have recorded the end-to-end setup here:

What are the options?

In addition to third party solutions / add-ons, an easy and quick way to get started is to use the different servivces on the SAP Business Technology Platform. Here we have three options:

 

  • SAP Event Mesh
  • Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite, see Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integ... - SAP Community
  • SAP Advanced Event Mesh, see SAP Advanced Event Mesh – Manage Advance Event Mes... - SAP Community

In this first iteration I want to focus on SAP Event Mesh. In the future I plan to do the same setup also for Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite.
(For the scenarios I am interested in, SAP Advanced Event Mesh is a little too much.)

 

SAP Event Mesh

There is a nice tutorial about creating events with Event Mesh Create Instance of SAP Event Mesh | SAP Tutorials. Unfortunately no trial instance is avaialble anymore (SAP Event Mesh: Trial to be retired - SAP Community), but if you have a "full" BTP Subaccount, getting started is quite easy.

Just create the required Instances in your SAP subaccount. 

For the instance, this is the JSON that I used:

 

{
    "emname": "eventMeshSandboxAzure",
    "namespace": "default/az/hbr",
    "version": "1.1.0",
    "resources": {
        "units": "10"
    },
    "options": {
        "management": true,
        "messagingrest": true,
        "messaging": true
    },
    "rules": {
        "topicRules": {
            "publishFilter": [
                "${namespace}/*"
            ],
            "subscribeFilter": [
                "${namespace}/*"
            ]
        },
        "queueRules": {
            "publishFilter": [
                "${namespace}/*"
            ],
            "subscribeFilter": [
                "${namespace}/*"
            ]
        }
    },
    "xs-security": {
        "oauth2-configuration": {
            "credential-types": ["binding-secret","x509"]
        }
    }
}

 

Now you are ready to create a service Binding (which can be used in the next step). 

 

What needs to be done on the SAP side?

The beauty of the SAP Event Mesh setup is, that you can take the information in the Service Binding and use transaction 

/IWXBE/CONFIG

to perform the channel configuration. Just import the information. 

Now you need to activate the channel and perform an Outbound Binding -- basically telling the channel which events it should forward to SAP Event Mesh. In my case I was using BusinessPartners: 

sap/s4/beh/businesspartner/v1/BusinessPartner/*

Queue configuration in SAP Event Mesh

With this we are almost done. We only need to configure a queue in SAP Event Mesh 

 

 

and create a related queue subscription. 

 

 

Testing the scenario

That's it! Now you can create a Business Partner in your SAP system:

 and you can see the new message in SAP Event Mesh

 

Stay tuned for further updates and checkout GitHub - hobru/EventingWithSAP for up to date information.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to restrict a measure in SAC Story tables and Charts?
entry.content:
Hi Sunandha, you cannot secure a measure. We can only apply security on model level (private dimensions), dimension level or folder level.

 

May be if you could tell your use case, then we can suggest alternatives.

entry.title: Re: 401K Limit changes for 2024
entry.content:
Hello Richa,

This has been delivered by note 3537136 (BEN: Annual limits for tax year 2025).

Best Regards,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: Stock check when creating the requisition or Shopping...
entry.content:
Hello Guys 

Thanks for the help until now. @Mrak1  I will check the threads that you sent, and come back with my opinion.

@DominikTylczyn  I agree with you that is not a complicated matter, the user checking the stock before doing the Requisition, the problem is solved.

entry.title: Re: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version
entry.content:
See, I have seen many many such issues 🙂 from my experience..

Try following -

1. folder access

2. make sure version is accessible for user

3. Dimension update access

4. and last which usually is the case after ruling out normal issues, sometimes developer mistakenly uses # as reference in his DA. So in this case, either developer would have to change the data action or you would need to provision access at # level for that dimension. Let me know if it works.

entry.title: Re: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget v...
entry.content:
See, I have seen many many such issues 🙂 from my experience..

Try following -

1. folder access

2. make sure version is accessible for user

3. Dimension update access

4. and last which usually is the case after ruling out normal issues, sometimes developer mistakenly uses # as reference in his DA. So in this case, either developer would have to change the data action or you would need to provision access at # level for that dimension. Let me know if it works.

entry.title: Erro ao abrir arquivo xls exportado em autorizações no SAP Business one versão 10.
entry.content:
Na aba de autorizações no SAP B1 versão 10, temos a opção de exportar a Excel a relação completa de usuário x autorizações do ambiente, no entanto ao executarmos ação o SAP retorna o erro:

Quando tivemos sucesso ao exportar a relação no momento de abrir o arquivo de Excel temos o erro de tabela:

Poderiam nos informar se já tiveram essa instabilidade no SAP B1 V10? Estaremos atentos aos comentarios sobre o tema, obrigado.

Att,

entry.title: Re: Create Hierarchies in a automatic way SAC
entry.content:
@Ganjos 

As William said, while loading the file, in data wrangling create a Parent ID column and then just take 3 characters from the left of the ID column. If you have sublevels like D01.01 as parent of D01.01.01.02 then you can use IF along with LENGTH() to check length and then either read 3 or 6 characters for parent column. But if its always D01 for all members starting with D01 then below should work.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: I am using IAS to provision user from LDAP to SAP S/4
entry.content:
To avoid huge amount of users sync i want to use "ldap.group.filter" but it looks it does not work and it retrieve all users even if they are not member of LDAP groups I want to filter on.

 

Any idea ?

entry.title: Re: Alternative-Based Confirmation – An Overview
Manual enrollment of global benefits
entry.content:

we have configured pension and insurance benefit plan and has linked to pay components. Employee goes in and manually enrolls to these benefits. Once it is done it the compensation information is not updated with the contribution or allowances like child allowance for which he enrolled manually.#SuccessFactors SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits 

Please let me know what could be the issue.

entry.title: Re: How to Remove a measure from a chart in sac script
entry.content:
@thayumanavan 

Ok why don't you first try to read the measure from the chart and log it and see what is the format of the measure and then trying the same format in removeMeasure API.

console.log(Chart_25.getMeasures(Feed.ValueAxis)); // This should give you the format.

Just try below

var Measurelist =Chart_25.getMeasures(Feed.ValueAxis);

for(var i=0;i<array1.length;i++)
{
Chart_25.removeMeasure(Measurelist[i], Feed.ValueAxis);
}

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

This would be for technical activities, specific to the client, that involve the implementation of the S/4HANA embedded EWM module. And there are activities such as:
Creating RFC Destination
RFC Assignment for calls from EWM
Generating distribution model for data transfer transaction to SAP EWM (EWM-S/4 Integration)
Enabling access for RFC communication in Internet Communication Framework (ICF) interfaces

entry.title: EWM warehouse task is not getting saved
entry.content:
I am new to EWM. We are configuring ASR integration. For which  I created an outbound delivery in ERP and this created an ODO in EWM. However when i try to save my warehouse task i get an error that the system couldnt determine storage bin. 

Below is the screenshot of the log.

My question is , what can I do next? 

This is my warehouse task which is not getting saved .

 

I have maintained the below Storage Type Search Sequence for Stock Removal.

Lasty I also need help with how I can add material in the below storage bin :

I am very fresh in EWM and actually don't have much experience. I am struggling wiht this problem for sometime now. Thanks all.

entry.title: Re: Defaulting to the legacy home page - H2 2024 (New Lea...
entry.content: That's right. The "Disable New Learning Experience" option has been removed with the 2411 version.

entry.title: Re: Tools or documentation to measure network to SAP Data...
entry.content:
Hi TP,

For accurate recommendations, I suggest reaching out to your SAP technical or sales representative, who can provide direct links to SAP product solutions and data center selection resources. Here are some general considerations that may help guide your initial understanding:

Differentiate SaaS vs. Non-SaaS Solutions: SAP differentiates data center options for SaaS solutions (like SAP S/4HANA Cloud) and non-SaaS products, as they often operate in separate environments and tenant configurations. The specific solution (e.g., SAP SaaS or Business Technology Platform) will impact the data center options available.

SAP Cloud and Hyperscaler Options: Many SAP SaaS and BTP solutions are hosted on hyperscalers like AWS, Azure, and GCP. However, even when hosted on a hyperscaler, only certain regions are SAP-approved for particular solutions. For example, GCP might have multiple options, but only specific regions are certified for SAP applications, which could affect performance and latency.

Internal SAP Tools: During my time at SAP, internal tools were available to assess data center performance and network connectivity. Factors such as subscription model or specific bill of materials (BOM) may also influence data center choices and network latency.

For a preliminary understanding, you may explore SAP’s public resources like bellow for high-level insights on data center compliance, network readiness, and cloud service locations:
https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/data-center.html
https://www.sap.cn/docs/download/agreements/product-use-and-support-terms/cls/en/list-of-data-centers-for-sap-cloud-services-english-v.5-2023.pdf
https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center.html
https://aws.amazon.com/architecture/networking/
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1100926

For measuring network latency to SAP Data Centers in Japan or Australia, the SAP NIPING tool is often recommended. NIPING helps measure latency and assess network performance between SAP systems and can be useful for fine-tuning network speed and identifying bottlenecks.
SAP Note 1100926 provides guidance on how to use NIPING for network performance measurement:
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1100926
I highly recommend contacting your SAP representative for detailed guidance on approved data center regions and tailored latency evaluations.

Hope this helps,

@Amin_Omidy

entry.title: Re: ERROR: Warehouse request, 10 must not be overpicked
entry.content:
Hello - I faced the same issue and I digged into the Storage Type Configurations. In Storage Type Configurations under Stock Removal Controls, the field Round to Whole Units was set to '5' which means 'Round WT Quantity to Available Qty'. I maintained just the Storage Bin Available Qty same as Outbound picking qty (say example OBD picking wty = 10 EA and i maintained 10 qty in the storage bin with same BATCH Niumber) and created the WT. It worked as expected. Due to constraints, couldn't add the screenshots. 

For questions: madan@asquaretechs.com

entry.title: Re: ERROR: Warehouse request, 10 must not be overpicked
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: EWM warehouse task is not getting saved
entry.content:
Hi 

In your screen log it is showing storage type 0020. but it is unable to find the source storage BIn

check this thread 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/system-couldn-t-determine-the-source-storage-bin/qaq-p/12136248

Also you asked for storage type 0010 to add stock 

Lasty I also need help with how I can add material in the below storage bin 

you can use manually /scwm/adprod to add the stock 

 

Regards

Rashid

entry.title: Assista ao SAP Inside Track Curitiba 2024 ao Vivo e Online!
entry.content:
Quer se atualizar sobre as mais recentes inovações do SAP e melhorar suas habilidades em S/4HANA? O SAP Inside Track Curitiba 2024 oferece uma oportunidade única para aprender com especialistas em diversas áreas! Você pode acompanhar o evento ao vivo no YouTube ou assistir ao replay das palestras depois, caso não possa participar no dia.

Abaixo está a programação completa, com links diretos para as apresentações no YouTube. Compartilhe com amigos e colegas para que mais pessoas possam se beneficiar desse conteúdo de qualidade e se conectar com a comunidade SAP.

Programação Completa de Sábado, 23 de Novembro de 2024:

 

08:50 - 09:40 Check-in & Recepção com Café da Manhã 

09:45 - 09:55 Abertura do Evento

10:00 - 10:15 Patrocinador - Nova Consulting

10:20 - 11:00 NOVA Advisory: Insights que Impulsionam Resultados Reais - Lucas Kalache, Nova Consulting

11:05 - 11:45 Reforma Tributária - o que devo saber? - Thamires Kuwahara, SAP

11:50 - 12:30 Digital Supply Chain Planning - Integrando Estratégia e Operação - Paulo Fernandes, SCM-Design; Rafael Caiuta, REDDOP

14:30 - 15:10 Geração S/4HANA: A Nova Era do Consultor SAP - Leonardo Assumpção, ASSUMTEK Group

15:15 - 15:55 MOVE to SAP S/4HANA: Principais Desafios - Rodrigo Andrade, R2A e Cast Group; Matheus Paschoal, Discover

16:25 - 17:05 Migração para SAP S/4 e o Caminho para o Clean Core - Luiz de Godoy, Stratesys; Thiago Toma, Delaware

17:05 - 17:30 Encerramento e Sorteio de Brindes

Não perca essa oportunidade e acesse a playlist completa no YouTube para ver as palestras ao vivo ou assistir ao replay depois. E não se esqueça de compartilhar este evento com todos que desejam se aprofundar no universo SAP. Vamos juntos fortalecer a comunidade!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello, what is the expected timeline for Delaware Family Leave wage types, TUB 152?

 

TAX TYPE 125EE PARENTAL LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 126ER PARENTAL LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 127EE MEDICAL LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 128ER MEDICAL LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 129EE FAMILY CAREGIVER/QE LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 130ER FAMILY CAREGIVER/QE LEAVE TAX STATE PLAN
TAX TYPE 131EE PARENTAL LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN
TAX TYPE 132ER PARENTAL LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN
TAX TYPE 133EE MEDICAL LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN
TAX TYPE 134ER MEDICAL LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN
TAX TYPE 135EE FAMILY CAREGIVER/QE LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN
TAX TYPE 136ER FAMILY CAREGIVER/QE LEAVE TAX EQUIVALENT PLAN

entry.title: Release Announcement: Administrating SAP Customer Data Platform
entry.content:
On behalf of the SAP CRM & CX Product Learning CoE team, I am thrilled to announce the official release of our new learning journey, Administrating SAP Customer Data Platform.

 

This comprehensive course is meticulously designed to equip you with the essential skills necessary for proficiently handling a wide range of administrative tasks within the SAP Customer Data Platform Console.

By the end of this learning journey, you will be able to:

  • Manage Console Users: Learn how to efficiently add, remove, and maintain users within the SAP Customer Data Platform Console, ensuring the right level of access and permissions for each individual.

  • Divide Business Units: Understand how to segment and organize different business units within the platform, allowing for a more streamlined and focused management approach.

  • Define Data Retention Rules: Gain the knowledge to configure data retention policies, ensuring compliance and optimal data management practices within your organization.

  • Utilize Export/Import Package Functionalities: Master the functionalities of exporting and importing data packages, enabling smooth data migration and integration processes.

  • Leverage Monitoring Capabilities: Acquire the skills to monitor and troubleshoot the ingestion and activation of customer data, ensuring seamless and error-free data processes.

So, what are you waiting for? Go to SAP Learning site, and enroll in Administrating SAP Customer Data Platform. Upon completion be sure to claim your digital badge to proudly display on your professional social network profile!

 


If you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to add a comment.

entry.title: Change CSS based on status value using Formatter Function XML View
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am asking question and similar which is already asked many times but not what I need help on...

I want to apply css class to control based on some status column value dynamically. I am using XML view and want to use Formatter function to check status and return CSS class name. This is not happening.

Wanted to know if this is even Possible with Formatter function. When I tried to change text using Formatter function it is working fine. I do not want to use Javascript to create these control dynamically and add Style...

Below is my current code:

<GenericTile header="{SHIP_TO_PARTY}" visible="true"  frameType="TwoByOne" class="Y">
<TileContent unit="" footer="{DOCKED_AT_DOOR}" >
                                <HBox class="sapUiTinyMarginTop">
                                    <VBox class="marginleft">
                                        <HBox>
                                            <VBox>
                                                <Text id="lbldate1” text="Enrolled Date" class="{path: 'DOCKED_AT_DOOR', formatter : '.formatter.formatColor'}"></Text>
                                            </VBox>
                                        </HBox>
                                    </VBox>
                                </HBox>
                            </TileContent>
                        </GenericTile>

 Formatter.js

sap.ui.define([], function () {
    "use strict";

    return {
        formatColor: function (v) {
            // if (v === "Y") {
            //  this.addStyleClass("green");
            // } else {
            //  this.addStyleClass("red");
            // }
            // return v;
            var sResult = "";
            if (v === 'Y') {
                sResult = "green";
            } return sResult;
        }
    };
});

Please help...

 

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Change CSS based on status value using Formatter Function XML View
entry.content: Wouldn't it be easy to confirm by debugging in the browser?

  2. Create the tables in the Audit schema or a separate schema?
  3. What are the steps to create the MOT tables?

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Tile Pointing to dynamic URL : S/4Hana
entry.content:
Hello @Jocelyn_Dart 

We are trying to make the Fiori tiles accessible from S4 system but for BW queries.

Example: when clicking on the tile from S4 Launchpad it will open AFO but the BW query which is available in BW system..

For that we have created a RFC between S4 and BW system also a system Alias and maintained the same in the /UI2/V_ALIASMAP table.

Provided the system Alias name in Target Mapping but still when i click on the Fiori Tile from S4 launchpad, AFO gets open but says cannot find the query.

Could you please help how to achieve this (S4 launchpad Fiori tile for BW system query)

Thanks in advance,

Manasa B.

entry.title: KBA 3370268 (program variant save bug) is unclear
entry.content:
Just in case, posting here about a weird content in the note 3370268 - "Do not save values" in program screen variant attributes is not working. - SAP for Me (see my rating below).

Please help me, if you read my question in the future, and you are interested by this note, please add a comment if you see a new version of the note (currently Version: 2, Released On: 19.12.2023), so that I'm informed, and I'll have a look. I ask here, just because I don't know a way to be informed of any change in an SAP note (if you know, please tell me).

Thank you.

Rating "Was this KBA helpful?" > No > "This article is inaccurate" and "This article is confusing" and the below comment in "Tell us what we can do to improve this document":

The steps to reproduce concern the attribute "do not save values", they are not related in any way to "Variant variables / Dynamic Date functions get not saved for invisible".

entry.title: Re: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP...
entry.content:
It seems to be related to the system (I was working in the Test system). I replicated the configuration in the Production system, and it worked correctly.




Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Snowflake MFA sync with SAP BO
entry.content: How to set up an MFA mechanism using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory) for Snowflake connectivity in SAP BI?

entry.title: Program variant has a value despite "save field without value" in ECC 6 EHP7
entry.content:
I'm a little surprised by a bug in my ECC system. I see a few old program variants of a custom program, with a parameter P_FILE_1 which has both one non-empty value and the checkbox "save field without value" checked.

If I save the program variant, the value is emptied, as I expect (back to the normal situation).

The program RSVARDOC_610 doesn't fix the issue (note that RSVARDOC_NEW doesn't exist in my system). RSVCHECK says that the program variant is fine.

For information, running the program with such a weird program variant (having both a non-empty value and the checkbox "save field without value" checked), behaves like if the checkbox was not checked, i.e. the parameter field in the selection screen is changed with the value from the program variant.

NB: only one selection screen.

Did you hear about this "bug"? I didn't find any SAP note about it.

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: KBA 3370268 (program variant save bug) is unclear
entry.content: Hey @Sandra_Rossi i loooove a good rating but i didnt get if you wish (me) to try that note behavior OR only how to be notified for notes changes

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @NWL,

The Delaware Paid Family and Medical Leave Tax Types will be delivered by the below notes.

Currently, the notes are still being finished by the developers, meaning you won't be able to access them by now.
However, I suggest you to keep an eye on those, as this should be released to customers soon.

3536013 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136).
3538215 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136 for Concurrent Employment).

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0
entry.content:
Hello @rosette_vaughn2,

The Delaware Paid Family and Medical Leave Tax Types will be delivered by the below notes.

Currently, the notes are still being finished by the developers, meaning you won't be able to access them by now.
However, I suggest you to keep an eye on those, as this should be released to customers soon.

3536013 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136).
3538215 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136 for Concurrent Employment).

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Changes In Word Documentation not reflecting in PDF Version
entry.content:
When generating documentation of a simulation, I made changes to the WORD doc by changing the title to "test", saved it then closed Word. I then generated the PDF file hoping that the changes made on the Word file would reflect when I generate in PDF.

I am certain it reflected the changes on another project, but I cannot seem to recreate this.

I followed the instructions to set up a WORD template under Documentation Style and link it under Documentation Settings.

Please could you help resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@CarlosAccorsi 

Per BSI - TUB 152 was released on November 6 with the Delaware changes.  So are you saying that there are other changes that need to be released by SAP still?  I thought these kind of changes were managed together and released simultaneously so when we run the sync tool all the necessary tables are updated.  We are on a short time frame to get this change in based on when we run our first payroll of 2025 and were planning to install the latest TUB on 11/18.  Do you anticipate that the SAP changes will be released prior to that date?

Thank you,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: Getting a blank screen when clicking on Joule Icon
entry.content:
Refer to

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-getting-started-with-joule-and-sap/ba-p/13575477

entry.title: ONB: Not able to see the Time management info for Onboardee/inactive Employee
entry.content:
Hi, 

we hired people through ONB, Manage pending hire, they are still inactive employee as their hire date are in the future. but we need to modify the time off data and Time sheet before their arrival.

we modify the As of date in the future (so on their hiring date or later), we go to the Time Management Block and we have  see this (see screen shot 1):

Time Sheet

You are not authorized to access time sheet data or the user does not exist.

Upcoming Time Off

You are not authorized to view time off data.

When we add employee through "add mew employee" and even if their hire date is in the future, we are able to display and modify their Time info. 

we checked the RBP and everything looks ok, so we are not able to fix the issue.

Any advice on this please?

Thanks, 

sevda

entry.title: Re: Class II_SDSLS_ESR_SALES_ORDER_BULK is not a proxy class
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Class II_SDSLS_ESR_SALES_ORDER_BULK is not a proxy class
entry.content:
Hi Pritam,

You need to activate Deployment Scenario SAP_COM_0288 using transaction /AIF/CONTENT_EXTRACT to solve this isse.

Reference doc: https://help.sap.com/doc/4410b8cf32544b888aa64c65cb9a4b2b/2305/en-US/fe30d316460c4e43bfb94a8df9d1ad61.pdf

entry.title: Re: Transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit
entry.content: Hi, I have the same Issue. When I tried to "Use Project in Different Client" i got an error "Project not found; Use F4 help to select a Project", but the project already exist. I got a recent upgrade from S4H 2021 to S4H 2023

entry.title: How to setup funded program as a control object in FM derivation strategy
entry.content:
Dear Authors,

Need guidance on setting up on Control Object Derivation strategy.

I have requirement where I need to load the budget at lowest (level5) WBS element and control at higher level 1.

Thanks,

Sam.

entry.title: Re: “SAP Profitability and Performance Management” - Impo...
entry.content:
Hi Nica,

Just to clarify, It is not possible to migrate from PaPM On Prem/Cloud SM to PaPM Cloud Universal Model.  

"Automatic migration of environment from SAP PaPM On-Premise or SAP PaPM Cloud SM to a SAP PaPM Cloud UM tenant is not possible."

Regards

entry.title: Re: Binding transfer problem
entry.content:
Without the full project I can't say for sure why.  However, I did a test with the following setup.

Data Table -> OnPress -> Navigation Action -> Modal Page

On the Modal page I have a button and a Key Value control to confirm the default binding for the page is the selected row from the data table.  In the OnPress of the button I call the first rule 

Button -> OnPress -> Rule 1 -> SetActionBinding -> Rule 2 -> Navigation -> Detail Page

I checked via the debugger that in both Rule 1 and Rule 2 the ClientAPI.binding was still set to the selected Row from the Data Table.  On the Detail Page there are default bindings to the data from the selected row and they are populated as expected confirming the binding was passed from the Data Table row to the detail page.

Since there is stuff in your Rule 2 I don't see I can't say if that impacts anything or not but it looks like you should be good to go assuming your detail page is trying to bind to the row properties from the Data Table.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to show a chart in the MDK web platf...
entry.content: MDK Web client does not currently support any charting display.  I am afraid I don't have any alternatives for you at this time.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Accounting Rules Engine (ARE) Powered by SAP PaPM Universal Model
entry.content:
Hi!

This content includes a way to retract information from PaPM UM to S/4HANA, similar to the finance ledger adapters in PaPM SM?

Is this possible in UM?

Regards

entry.title: Re: How do I created a deep entity in an MDK app
entry.content: Typically you would call CreateEntity for the PM Order and the call CreateRelatedEntity for the Operation to associate it to the PM Order.  You can optionally include both of these in a Change Set to guarantee they go together to the backend and use pending references to access the new key assuming the backing is assigning key values and if needed in the Operation Set depending on your Odata model.

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0
entry.content:
@CarlosAccorsi 

Per BSI - TUB 152 was released on November 6 with the Delaware changes.  So are you saying that there are other changes that need to be released by SAP still?  I thought these kind of changes were managed together and released simultaneously so when we run the sync tool all the necessary tables are updated.  We are on a short time frame to get this change in based on when we run our first payroll of 2025 and were planning to install the latest TUB on 11/18.  Do you anticipate that the SAP changes will be released prior to that date?

Thank you,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@Sefan_Linders  Nice blog, thanks. We are looking for options to do Datasphere DAC using GL/Profit Center/Cost Center Hierarchy Directory Node and we want to use Hierarchy Directory Nodes in Calculated Columns of Datasphere modeling objects (to replace BEx query cell definitions with Hierarchy nodes) but Datasphere don't have standard functionality. Can you please suggest if you have any ideas on these both use cases. 

Thanks Prasanna

entry.title: Re: Tables for BOM Header and Components
entry.content: You also need to add table STAS between STKO (header) and STPO(Items) otherwise, you will have issue for each alternative (STLAL).

entry.title: Re: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget v...
entry.content:
Hi #SahilTaneja Thanks for your inputs.

1. folder access - Do you mean the folder which contains DA? I given authorization to Individual Data Actions instead of folder.

2. make sure version is accessible for user - My Version is not enabled DAC, So I think all versions are accessible to all users.

3. Dimension update access - No new Dimensions are updating in my DA, hence I Provided read access for all dimensions in role. And my DA against all measures with existing dimension members for Company code.

4. you would need to provision access at # level for that dimension. - In my case I am working against Company Code, So there is data generation at # level for company code.

If you see my error message - "you are missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version". I don't know what is the issue with Data saving in Version(Budget)

Regards, Vasu
